sourceName: U.S. Census ACS 2024 5-Year Vacancy Status - New York City Counties
notes: Official U.S. Census ACS 2020-2024 5-year detailed table B25004 aggregate county estimates for vacant units by status. Covers Bronx, Kings, New York, Queens, and Richmond counties. No individual addresses, names, occupancy records, devices, or household-level records are imported.
